Once upon a time, there was a little cat. The cat liked to play. One day, the cat found a big box. The box had a long string. The string was very special.

The cat and her friends were very happy. They clapped their hands and laughed. They all wanted to show them how to share the string. So, they all played together and had a great day.

From that day on, Kitty and her mom became good friends.
